biological_replicate: C57BL/6J male and female WT and truncated βIV-spectrin (qv4J) littermate mice were used.
technical_replicate: Experiments were conducted in technical triplicates.
experimental_design: CFs isolated from βIV-spectrin–deficient mice (mutant βIV-spectrin allele lacking repeats 10 through C terminus [qv4J] mice...)
factor_value: we sought to determine the mechanism for CaMKII-dependent regulation of βIV-spectrin and CF activity.
number_of_fractions: No fractionation or pre-fractionation is described anywhere in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: C57BL/6J male and female WT and truncated βIV-spectrin (qv4J) littermate mice
number_of_samples: 2 biological replicates described, and no fractions mentioned.
